political.s: Allstate's political contributions lean right-leaning. FEC data shows $413K in raised donations with 69% to Republicans ($10,000/$14,500). Recent OpenSecrets data shows $710K in 2024 contributions and $2.49M in lobbying spend, primarily focused on insurance industry advocacy through trade associations.

charity.s: Allstate Foundation supports youth empowerment, domestic violence prevention, racial equity, and nonprofit leadership development. The company reported over 117,000 volunteer hours in 2024 with matched employee giving. Recent grants include $6.2M for relationship abuse survivors and $2.2M in 2025 grants focused on economic empowerment.
charity.amt: $8.9M-$9.4M annually (trade associations and 501(c)(4) giving); plus Allstate Foundation grants
charity.focus: Youth service, domestic violence prevention, racial equity, nonprofit leadership, disaster resilience

environment.s: Allstate committed to net zero Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions by 2030, exceeding Paris Agreement targets by 20 years. Company achieved CDP 'A List' recognition and Dow Jones Sustainability Index inclusion. Owns 1,600-acre farm with wetlands restoration and invests in renewable energy and supplier sustainability requirements.

labor.s: Limited public NLRB/OSHA violations identified, though one 2019 NLRB case involved Allstate-affiliated company. Glassdoor reviews show mixed compensation and benefits ratings, with employees ranking compensation in bottom 40% of comparable companies. Company emphasizes workplace flexibility and culture but faces employee satisfaction challenges.

dei.s: Allstate actively promotes Inclusive Diversity & Equity (IDE) as a core value with a dedicated Chief Diversity Officer. Company committed to doubling diverse supplier spending, became first issuer to select exclusively minority/women/veteran-owned firms for $1.2B bond, and joined CEO Action for Diversity pledge. Representation goals exceeded.

guns.s: Not applicable - insurance company does not manufacture or directly sell firearms. As insurer, may provide coverage for firearms-related incidents as part of standard homeowners/property policies.

privacy.s: Allstate collects extensive personal data including IP address, browsing history, driving data, and claims history. Privacy policies disclose data sharing with service providers and third parties. Company faces 2024 lawsuit alleging illegal cellphone tracking to raise premiums without consent, suggesting enforcement challenges.

execPay.s: CEO Thomas Wilson earned $26.15M total compensation in 2024 ($1.42M salary + $11.90M stock awards). CEO-to-median worker pay ratio is 239:1, significantly above insurance industry median of 70:1, indicating above-average executive compensation disparity.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
